name: Glitch Imp
lore: A sneaky trickster made of broken computer magic! It pops up where you least expect it and loves causing silly chaos.

name: Neurodrake Hatchling

attacks.name: Mind Peek
attacks.effect: DC13 Wis save or charmed 1 turn

lore: A baby dragon made of glowing rainbow energy! It's curious about friendly minds — but its games can get a little too wild.

name: Nexus Guard Drone
lore: A floating robot guard that watches over the magic gateways. It shoots warning lasers at anyone who gets too close!
